---
title: 'D&D Character: DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman'
date: '2024-01-17T08:32:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: false
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '8642624248104232074'
blogger_filename: '/2024/01/d-character-daat-neeman.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
---

<header class="entry-header" style="background-color: white; box-sizing: inherit; font-family: Lato, &quot;helvetica neue&quot;, helvetica, arial; font-size: 16px;"><h1 class="entry-title" style="box-sizing: inherit; font-family: &quot;Playfair Display&quot;; font-size: 30px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 45px; margin: 0px 0px 15px; text-align: center;">D&amp;D Character: DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman</h1><div class="entry-meta" style="box-sizing: inherit; display: inline-block; font-size: 17px; margin: auto auto 5px; padding: 0px 20px; text-align: center; width: 714.516px;"><div class="blog-data-wrapper" style="box-sizing: inherit; display: inline-block; margin-bottom: 10px; min-height: 24px; position: relative; width: 674.516px;"><div class="post-data-divider" style="background: rgb(0, 0, 0); box-sizing: inherit; height: 1px; left: 0px; margin: auto; max-width: 480px; position: absolute; right: 0px; top: 14px; width: 480px; z-index: 1;"></div><div class="post-data-positioning" style="box-sizing: inherit; left: 0px; position: absolute; right: 0px; top: 0px; z-index: 1;"><div class="post-data-text" style="background-attachment: initial; background-clip: initial; background-image: initial; background-origin: initial; background-position: initial; background-repeat: initial; background-size: initial; box-sizing: inherit; display: inline-block; margin: auto auto 5px; padding: 0px 20px;"><span class="posted-on" style="box-sizing: inherit;">Posted on&nbsp;<a href="http://darrellwolfe.com/dd-character-daat-neeman/" rel="bookmark" style="box-sizing: inherit; color: black; text-decoration-line: none; transition: all 0.1s linear 0s;"><time class="entry-date published" datetime="2024-01-17T16:50:27-08:00" style="box-sizing: inherit;">January 17, 2024</time></a></span><span class="byline" style="box-sizing: inherit;">&nbsp;by&nbsp;<span class="author vcard" style="box-sizing: inherit;"><a class="url fn n" href="http://darrellwolfe.com/author/darrellwolfe/" style="box-sizing: inherit; color: black; text-decoration-line: none; transition: all 0.1s linear 0s;">darrellwolfe</a></span></span></div></div></div></div></header><div class="entry-content" style="background-color: white; box-sizing: inherit; counter-reset: footnotes 0; font-family: lato, lato, &quot;helvetica neue&quot;, helvetica, arial, sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 24px;"><figure class="wp-block-image size-full is-resized" style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 1em 0px;"><div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;"><img alt="" border="0" class="placeholder" height="240" id="aa3e0597096f9" src="/images/imported/www-blogger-com/transparent-73362928c97d.gif" style="background-color: #d8d8d8; background-image: url('/images/imported/fonts-gstatic-com/baseline-insert-photo-grey600-24dp-d979ca3717c8.png'); background-position: center; background-repeat: no-repeat; opacity: 0.6;" width="320" /></div><br /></figure><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em;"></p><h2 class="wp-block-heading" style="box-sizing: inherit; color: #222222; font-family: &quot;Playfair Display&quot;, lato, &quot;helvetica neue&quot;, helvetica, arial; font-weight: 400; line-height: 33.6px; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-top: 0px;">D&amp;D Stat Sheet</h2><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em;"><a href="https://www.dndbeyond.com/characters/116850351/zlVyWa" style="box-sizing: inherit; color: black; transition: all 0.1s linear 0s;">DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўemanГўв‚¬в„ўs Character Sheet Гўв‚¬вЂњ D&amp;D Beyond (dndbeyond.com)</a></p><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em;"></p><h2 class="wp-block-heading" style="box-sizing: inherit; color: #222222; font-family: &quot;Playfair Display&quot;, lato, &quot;helvetica neue&quot;, helvetica, arial; font-weight: 400; line-height: 33.6px; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-top: 0px;"><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Character: DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman</span></h2><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em;">DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Son of NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman Sefer<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Of the Shamayim Tribe which is of the Ioun Cult of Knowledge<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />But he left for the MaddaГўв‚¬в„ўkishuf cult<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Of the deity OrГўв‚¬в„ўNeshamah</p><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em;">Followers of Or-Neshamah seek to honor the deity through the pursuit of knowledge, the practice of magic, and the cultivation of their souls.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />An Air Genasi, Male<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Descended from FatherГўв‚¬в„ўs Side; Grandfather was a Genie, Grandmother a Human</p><h2 class="wp-block-heading" style="box-sizing: inherit; color: #222222; font-family: &quot;Playfair Display&quot;, lato, &quot;helvetica neue&quot;, helvetica, arial; font-weight: 400; line-height: 33.6px; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-top: 0px;">Names</h2><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em;"><br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Name: DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў DaГўв‚¬в„ўat (Г—вЂњГ—ВўГ—ВЄ): Гўв‚¬Е“KnowledgeГўв‚¬Вќ or Гўв‚¬Е“Wisdom,Гўв‚¬Вќ highlighting the characterГўв‚¬в„ўs insightful or intellectual nature.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman (Г—В Г—ВђГ—ЕѕГ—Её): Гўв‚¬Е“FaithfulГўв‚¬Вќ or Гўв‚¬Е“Scholar,Гўв‚¬Вќ suggesting a character who is trustworthy, dedicated, or scholarly.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Parentage: Son of NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman Sefer<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman (Г—В Г—ВђГ—ЕѕГ—Её): Repeating Гўв‚¬Е“FaithfulГўв‚¬Вќ or Гўв‚¬Е“Scholar,Гўв‚¬Вќ which could imply a family legacy of wisdom and learning.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Sefer (Г—ВЎГ—В¤Г—ВЁ): Гўв‚¬Е“BookГўв‚¬Вќ or Гўв‚¬Е“Scroll,Гўв‚¬Вќ suggesting a lineage deeply rooted in knowledge, wisdom, or the preservation of lore.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Tribe: Shamayim<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Shamayim (Г—В©Г—ЕѕГ—в„ўГ—Вќ): Гўв‚¬Е“HeavensГўв‚¬Вќ or Гўв‚¬Е“Sky,Гўв‚¬Вќ aligning perfectly with the Air GenasiГўв‚¬в„ўs elemental affinity and possibly indicating a tribe that is spiritually or literally connected to the sky or the heavens.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /></p><h2 class="wp-block-heading" style="box-sizing: inherit; color: #222222; font-family: &quot;Playfair Display&quot;, lato, &quot;helvetica neue&quot;, helvetica, arial; font-weight: 400; line-height: 33.6px; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-top: 0px;">Introduction to DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўaman</h2><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em;"></p><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em;">Snow fell, in a soft but constant accumulation, attaching itself to every tree in the forests just outside of the exotic mountain monastery. The Shamayim Tribe had long held a position in one of the many monasteries of Ioun (N), Goddess of Knowledge. Tucked away in a plateau at one of the highest peaks of the mountains, where the cosmos as the earth kiss and whispers of ancient secrets carry their tales of forgotten magic, DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman, son of NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman Sefer, a minor noble of the Shamayim Tribe had grown discontent with his studies.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Looking back at the snowless village, fertile with magic, he took a deep breath, and sighed. Once he stepped outside of this place, he would be embarking on a journey unlike any he had known. All previous excursions from this village had been with groups and mentors, but this time he was on his own. Ioun herself had guided him to the thread he was now pulling, and the tapestry had led him to this trail.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />The moonlightГўв‚¬в„ўs reflection on the snow danced on his pale blue-pink skin, and as it created a white cowl over his light blue hair. The silver in his eyes wet with tears, as he was about to leave his people and his own behind. He cinched his dimensionless bag, full of his library, potions, and trinkets, he began his journey.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Keeping to the paths, his 6Гўв‚¬в„ў5Гўв‚¬Вќ frame avoiding the branches, he began his long descent into the world of Humankind. Upon reaching a proper clearing, where he could catch a clear vision of the lights at the foot of the mountains, DaГўв‚¬в„ўat allowed his weight to lighten, then he caught the wind, floating up into the air, and then falling like a leaf, floating slowly to the towns and villages 1,000s of feet below.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />As he descended to the world of Humankind, Elfs, Dwarves, Dragonborn, and the other species of middle earth, he ruminated on the events that led him to leave.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman, once an acolyte in the cloistered halls of the Ioun, the Goddess of Knowledge, found himself at odds with the stagnation and corruption festering within. The Acolytes of Ioun had become ruthlessly isolationist in the centuries building up to this day. His soul, restless and unfulfilled, yearned for a deeper truth, a truth that lay beyond the dogma and ritual of his now former faith. It was in the ancient, arcane whispers of the MaddaГўв‚¬в„ўkishuf cult that DaГўв‚¬в„ўat discovered his true calling Гўв‚¬вЂњ a path that embraced the sanctity of the soul and the boundless potential of the magical and the mundane. Ioun herself lamented at what had become of the Shamayim Tribe in her absence, but remaining neutral, she did not intervene. For DaГўв‚¬в„ўat; however, who sought her wisdom on how to handle things, she led him to her celestial counterpart, OrГўв‚¬в„ўNeshamah. His Tribe called the discovered text Heresy, and they sought to destroy it, forcing DaГўв‚¬в„ўat to leave under the cover of night.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Soon, far from the lofty abodes of the Shamayim Tribe, DaГўв‚¬в„ўat will ventures through strange lands and among even stranger companions. A scholar at heart, yet naive in the ways of the world, he navigates his new reality with an air of dignified inexperience, his upbringing among the templeГўв‚¬в„ўs elite a stark contrast to the rough and untamed frontiers of his journey. With ideals that champion change and a bond to a sacred text under threat, DaГўв‚¬в„ўatГўв‚¬в„ўs quest is as much about self-discovery as it is about preserving the ancient knowledge he holds dear.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Yet, for all his wisdom and learning, DaГўв‚¬в„ўatГўв‚¬в„ўs greatest flaw lies in his obsession. Once a goal takes root in his mind, it consumes him, blinding him to all else Гўв‚¬вЂњ a trait that will lead him down many a perilous path and into the company of unlikely allies. But in these alliances, forged in the crucible of necessity and mutual respect for knowledge and curiosity, DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman finds not only the strength to confront his enemies but also the opportunity to grow beyond the confines of his former life.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />In his pursuit of deeper truths, DaГўв‚¬в„ўat practices the sacred rituals of his faith, seeking to connect with the OrГўв‚¬в„ўNeshamah through study, deep meditation, and reflection. He dwells in a world where the boundaries between science and sorcery blur, where each discovery is a step closer to the divine, and where every spell cast is a prayer to OrГўв‚¬в„ўNeshamah, illuminating the path to understanding and the depths of magic.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman, a wanderer between worlds, a seeker of the sacred in the mundane, and a cultivator of the soulГўв‚¬в„ўs wonders, continues his odyssey across the stars, his story a tapestry woven from the threads of knowledge, faith, and an unyielding desire to uncover the secrets of the cosmos and of his own soul.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Ж’<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /></p><h2 class="wp-block-heading" style="box-sizing: inherit; color: #222222; font-family: &quot;Playfair Display&quot;, lato, &quot;helvetica neue&quot;, helvetica, arial; font-weight: 400; line-height: 33.6px; margin-bottom: 15px; margin-top: 0px;">Description</h2><p style="box-sizing: inherit; margin: 0px 0px 1.5em;"><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Hair</span>: Light Blue<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Skin</span>: Pale with pink and blue tints<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Eyes</span>: Light Blue/Silver<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Height</span>: 6Гўв‚¬в„ў5Гўв‚¬Вќ<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Weight</span>: 190 Lbs<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Age&nbsp;</span>(Years): 3,007<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Gender</span>: Male<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Personality traits:</span>&nbsp;IГўв‚¬в„ўve spent so long in the temple that i have little practical experience dealing with people in the outside world. IГўв‚¬в„ўve enjoyed fine food, drink, and high society among my templeГўв‚¬в„ўs elite. Rough living grates on me.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Ideals</span>: Change. We must help bring about the changes the gods are constantly working in the world. (chaotic)<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Bonds</span>: I seek to preserve a sacred text that my enemies consider heretical and seek to destroy.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Flaws</span>: Once i pick a goal, i become obsessed with it to the detriment of everything else in my life.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Cult</span>: MaddaГўв‚¬в„ўkishuf cult of the deity OrГўв‚¬в„ўNeshamah<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Allies</span>: Any who value curiosity and learning<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Enemies</span>: Any who value tradition over curiosity<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Backstory</span>: DaГўв‚¬в„ўat NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman, Son of NeГўв‚¬в„ўeman Sefer, Of the Shamayim Tribe, An acolyte of the MaddaГўв‚¬в„ўkishuf cult of the deity OrГўв‚¬в„ўNeshamah, pursuer of knowledge, practitioner of magic, and cultivator of the wonders of the soul. DaГўв‚¬в„ўat looks for the sacred inside the mundane, the magical inside the ordinary. He was so preoccupied with his own learning; however, that he failed to see the corruption in the practitioners of his religion of origin. While his family had long served knowledge, they had lost the magic many generations ago. Departing from his origin cult, Ioun (N) Гўв‚¬вЂњ Goddess of Knowledge, he discovered the cult of OrГўв‚¬в„ўNeshamah in his studies. He left his home among the clouds and mountains, to seek link minded fellows among the other races. He has been on his journey just long enough now to realize, he will need to make unlikely friends and unnatural alliances if he is to cope in his new world.Гўв‚¬Ж’<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Religion: MaddaГўв‚¬в„ўkishuf is the cult of deity OrГўв‚¬в„ўNeshamah<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Core Beliefs:</span><br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Harmony of Knowledge and Magic: This religion believes in the harmonious blend of scientific knowledge (Гўв‚¬Е“MaddaГўв‚¬Вќ) and magical practices (Гўв‚¬Е“KishufГўв‚¬Вќ). It teaches that true understanding comes from the synthesis of empirical learning and mystical experience.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Sanctity of the Soul: The soul, or Гўв‚¬Е“Neshamah,Гўв‚¬Вќ is central to their beliefs. The soul is seen as the breath of life, an ethereal essence that bridges the material and magical realms.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Pursuit of Enlightenment: Followers seek enlightenment through the study of the natural world, magical practices, and introspection to understand the deeper truths of the soul.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Practices:<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /></span>Гўв‚¬Вў Scholarly Study: Devotees engage in the study of various sciences, seeing this as a way to appreciate the intricacies of the world and the laws that govern it.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Magical Rituals: They practice sorcery not as a means of power, but as a way to connect with the mystical forces of the universe and to explore the depths of the soul.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Meditation and Reflection: Deep contemplation and meditation are used to connect with the Neshamah and to achieve inner harmony.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Structure:<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /></span>Гўв‚¬Вў The religion may have temples that double as libraries and schools of magic, with priests who are also scholars and sorcerers.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Deity</span>: Or-Neshamah<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Nature</span>:<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Or-Neshamah (Light of the Soul) is a deity who embodies the unity of science and magic, and the divine essence of the soul.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Domains</span>:<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў&nbsp;<span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Knowledge</span>: As a deity of understanding and enlightenment.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў&nbsp;<span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Arcana</span>: Representing the magical aspect and the mysteries of the universe.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў&nbsp;<span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Life</span>: Emphasizing the soulГўв‚¬в„ўs vital role in life and the cosmos.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Characteristics</span>:<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Or-Neshamah is seen as a guiding light, a source of wisdom that illuminates the path of knowledge and the depths of magic.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў The deity is often depicted as a figure surrounded by symbols of science (like stars, atoms) and magic (runes, a staff), with a radiant soul at the center.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" /><span style="box-sizing: inherit; font-weight: 700;">Worship</span>:<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў Followers of Or-Neshamah seek to honor the deity through the pursuit of knowledge, the practice of magic, and the cultivation of their souls.<br style="box-sizing: inherit;" />Гўв‚¬Вў They might celebrate festivals that align with astronomical events, reflecting the union of the cosmic and mystical.</p></div>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div id="mc_embed_signup">
<form action="https://darrellwolfe.us3.list-manage.com/subscribe/post?u=979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba&amp;id=14df3ba97b" class="validate" id="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" method="post" name="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" novalidate="" target="_blank">
<div id="mc_embed_signup_scroll">
<label>Subscribe Now - Pursue a No Hiding Lifestyle</label>&nbsp;<input class="email" id="mce-EMAIL" name="EMAIL" required="" type="email" value="" /><br />
<div aria-hidden="true" style="left: -5000px; position: absolute;">
<input name="b_979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba_14df3ba97b" tabindex="-1" type="text" value="" /></div>
<div class="clear">
<input class="button" id="mc-embedded-subscribe" name="subscribe" type="submit" value="Subscribe" /></div>
</div>
</form>
</div>
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Shalom: Live Long and Prosper!</span><br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell Wolfe (DG Wolfe)</span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant @&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/start-here-about_12.html" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.com</a></span><br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/" target="_blank">Clifton StrengthsFinder</a>: Intellection, Learner,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Ideation,</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">&nbsp;Achiever, Input</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" target="_blank">16Personalities</a> (Myers-Briggs Type): INFJ</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span></div>
